mapper.select: SELECT ID, SIGN_WORD_TITLE, SIGN_WORD_DESCRIPTION, SIGN_WORD_CATEGORY, SIGN_WORD_THUMBNAIL_URL, SIGN_WORD_VIDEO_URL, SIGN_WORD_IMAGES, SIGN_WORD_SOURCE_URL, SIGN_WORD_CREATE_AT, SIGN_WORD_UPDATE_AT FROM TBL_SIGN_WORD ORDER BY ID DESC

SELECT ID, SIGN_WORD_TITLE, SIGN_WORD_DESCRIPTION, SIGN_WORD_CATEGORY, SIGN_WORD_THUMBNAIL_URL, SIGN_WORD_VIDEO_URL, SIGN_WORD_IMAGES, SIGN_WORD_SOURCE_URL, SIGN_WORD_CREATE_AT, SIGN_WORD_UPDATE_AT FROM TBL_SIGN_WORD WHERE SIGN_WORD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR SIGN_WORD_DESCRIPTION LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR SIGN_WORD_CATEGORY LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY ID DESC

SELECT ID, SIGN_WORD_TITLE, SIGN_WORD_DESCRIPTION, SIGN_WORD_CATEGORY, SIGN_WORD_THUMBNAIL_URL, SIGN_WORD_VIDEO_URL, SIGN_WORD_IMAGES, SIGN_WORD_SOURCE_URL, SIGN_WORD_CREATE_AT, SIGN_WORD_UPDATE_AT FROM TBL_SIGN_WORD WHERE ID = #{id}

SELECT ID, SIGN_WORD_TITLE, SIGN_WORD_DESCRIPTION, SIGN_WORD_CATEGORY, SIGN_WORD_THUMBNAIL_URL, SIGN_WORD_VIDEO_URL, SIGN_WORD_IMAGES, SIGN_WORD_SOURCE_URL, SIGN_WORD_CREATE_AT, SIGN_WORD_UPDATE_AT FROM TBL_SIGN_WORD WHERE SIGN_WORD_SOURCE_URL = #{signWordSourceUrl}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_SIGN_WORD.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_SIGN_WORD ( ID, SIGN_WORD_TITLE, SIGN_WORD_DESCRIPTION, SIGN_WORD_CATEGORY, SIGN_WORD_THUMBNAIL_URL, SIGN_WORD_VIDEO_URL, SIGN_WORD_IMAGES, SIGN_WORD_SOURCE_URL ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{signWordTitle}, #{signWordDescription}, #{signWordCategory}, #{signWordThumbnailUrl}, #{signWordVideoUrl}, #{signWordImages}, #{signWordSourceUrl} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_SIGN_WORD SET SIGN_WORD_TITLE = #{signWordTitle}, SIGN_WORD_DESCRIPTION = #{signWordDescription}, SIGN_WORD_CATEGORY = #{signWordCategory}, SIGN_WORD_THUMBNAIL_URL = #{signWordThumbnailUrl}, SIGN_WORD_VIDEO_URL = #{signWordVideoUrl}, SIGN_WORD_IMAGES = #{signWordImages}, SIGN_WORD_SOURCE_URL = #{signWordSourceUrl}, SIGN_WORD_UPDATE_AT = SYSDATE WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_SIGN_WORD WHERE SIGN_WORD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR SIGN_WORD_DESCRIPTION LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR SIGN_WORD_CATEGORY LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT ID, SIGN_WORD_TITLE, SIGN_WORD_EMOJI FROM ( SELECT ID, SIGN_WORD_TITLE, SIGN_WORD_EMOJI FROM TBL_SIGN_WORD WHERE SIGN_WORD_TITLE IS NOT NULL AND SIGN_WORD_CATEGORY IS NOT NULL AND SIGN_WORD_CATEGORY != '분류 정보 없음' AND SIGN_WORD_TITLE NOT LIKE '%-%' AND LENGTH(SIGN_WORD_TITLE) <= 20 ORDER BY ORA_HASH(SIGN_WORD_TITLE || #{weekKey}) ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}
